description: Registered mechanism × variant pairs for ISB1 mechanism_eval. Rows whose mechanism/mechanism_variant do not appear here are flagged unregistered by utils/mechanism_eval.py and must not be cited as certified.

variants.description: No mechanism applied. Used as the reference point for all other mechanism rows.
Per-tensor FP8 E4M3 KV cache quantization. Engine-native path (vLLM --kv-cache-dtype fp8, SGLang --kv-cache-dtype fp8_e4m3).
TurboQuant-class Hadamard-rotated 4-bit KV quantization. Requires non-null quality_eval_id to be cited at supported tier.
KVTC-class tensor-codebook KV compression. Requires non-null quality_eval_id to be cited at supported tier.
TriAttention-class sparse-attention variant. Requires non-null quality_eval_id to be cited at supported tier.
Multi-token prediction head as draft model. Requires draft_model_id and speculative_acceptance_rate.
EAGLE-3 speculative decoding. Requires draft_model_id and speculative_acceptance_rate.
Medusa speculative decoding. Requires draft_model_id and speculative_acceptance_rate.
DeepFlash-style draft stack. Requires draft_model_id and speculative_acceptance_rate.
